Requirement_Summary: Align with national digital transformation strategy
Deliver government services through digital channels
Enable secure data sharing between government entities
Provide accessible digital services to all citizens
Adopt cloud-first approach for government IT
Use open standards and avoid vendor lock-in
Implement cybersecurity measures for government services
Protect citizen data in government systems
Ensure transparency in digital government operations
Foster innovation in government service delivery
Build digital capacity in government workforce
Maintain secure and reliable government IT infrastructure
